title: OctopusGarden Scenario
description: Holdout validation scenario for OctopusGarden. See docs/architecture.md for full specification.

id.description: Unique scenario identifier (lowercase alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores).

description.description: Human-readable description of what this scenario validates.

type.description: Scenario type. Currently 'api' only for MVP; 'functional' also accepted.

weight.description: Relative weight for aggregate satisfaction scoring. Defaults to 1.0.

satisfaction_criteria.description: Overall criteria the LLM judge uses to evaluate this scenario.

setup.description: Setup steps executed before judged steps. Failures are fatal.

steps.description: Judged steps. Each is scored by the LLM judge.

expect.description: Natural-language expectation judged by the LLM.

capture.description: Variables to extract from the response for use in later steps.

body.description: Request body. Objects/arrays are JSON-serialized; strings sent as-is.

command.description: Shell command to execute (run via sh -c). May contain {variable} references.

stdin.description: Input to send to the command's stdin. May contain {variable} references.

env.description: Environment variables to set. Values may contain {variable} references.

timeout.description: Command timeout as a Go duration (e.g. '30s', '5m', '100ms'). Default: 30s.

name.description: Variable name for substitution in later steps via {name}.

jsonpath.description: Dot-notation JSONPath (e.g. $.id, $.data.name). Only scalar values supported.

source.description: Capture source for exec, browser, or grpc steps. Can be combined with jsonpath.

service.description: Fully qualified gRPC service name (e.g. 'telemetry.TelemetryService'). May contain {variable} references.

method.description: gRPC method name (e.g. 'RegisterSensor'). May contain {variable} references.

body.description: JSON request message body. May contain {variable} references.

headers.description: gRPC metadata headers as key-value pairs.

timeout.description: Call timeout as a Go duration (e.g. '30s', '5s'). Default: 30s.

stream.description: Streaming configuration. Nil for unary calls.

messages.description: Client-streaming: list of JSON messages to send.

timeout.description: Receive timeout as a Go duration.

count.description: Number of messages to collect from server stream.

background.description: Start stream in background goroutine for persistent streaming.

id.description: Reference a named background stream to collect buffered messages.

url.description: URL path for navigate action (relative to base URL). May contain {variable} references.

selector.description: CSS selector for click, fill, and assert actions. May contain {variable} references.

value.description: Text to type for fill action. May contain {variable} references.

text.description: Assert: element must contain this text.

text_absent.description: Assert: element must NOT contain this text.

count.description: Assert: expected number of matching elements.

timeout.description: Wait timeout as a Go duration (e.g. '10s', '30s'). Default: 10s.
